name: Bench Press
description: A chest exercise where you press a barbell upwards while lying on a bench.

name: Inclined Bench Press
description: A variation of the bench press performed on an inclined bench to target the upper chest.

name: Declined Bench Press
description: A variation of the bench press performed on a declined bench to target the lower chest.

name: Overhead Shoulder Press
description: A shoulder exercise where you press a weight overhead while standing or seated.

name: Deadlift
description: A full-body exercise that involves lifting a barbell from the ground to a standing position.

name: Pec Fly Machine
description: A machine exercise that isolates the chest muscles by mimicking the motion of a fly.

name: Leg Extension Machine
description: A machine exercise that targets the quadriceps by extending the legs from a seated position.

name: Squat
description: A lower body exercise where you bend your knees and hips to lower your body, then stand back up.

name: Barbell Back Squat
description: A lower body exercise where you bend your knees and hips to lower your body, with a barbell placed across your upper back, then stand back up.

name: Leg Press Machine
description: A machine exercise where you push a weight away from you using your legs.

name: Lat Pulldown
description: A machine exercise that targets the upper back by pulling a bar down towards your chest.

name: Pull-Up
description: An upper body exercise where you lift your body up to a bar using your back and arm muscles.

name: Seated Row
description: A machine exercise that targets the back muscles by pulling a handle towards your torso while seated.

name: Bicep Curl
description: An arm exercise that targets the biceps by lifting a weight towards your shoulder.

name: Tricep Overhead Extension
description: An arm exercise that targets the triceps by extending the arm at the elbow.

name: Leg Curl Machine
description: A machine exercise that targets the hamstrings by curling the legs towards the buttocks.

name: Lateral Raise
description: A shoulder exercise where you lift weights out to the side of your body.

name: Front Raise
description: A shoulder exercise where you lift weights to the front of your body.

name: Calf Raise
description: A lower body exercise that targets the calf muscles by raising the heels off the ground.

name: Hammer Curl
description: An arm exercise similar to the bicep curl, but with a neutral grip.

name: Preacher Curl
description: A bicep curl variation performed on a preacher bench to isolate the biceps.

name: Cable Tricep Pushdown
description: An arm exercise that targets the triceps by pushing a cable attachment downwards.

name: Chest Press Machine
description: A machine exercise that mimics the bench press.

name: Smith Machine Squat
description: A squat variation performed on a Smith machine for added stability.

name: T-Bar Row
description: A back exercise where you pull a T-bar towards your torso.

name: Bent Over Row
description: A back exercise where you bend at the waist and pull a weight towards your torso.

name: Upright Row
description: A shoulder exercise where you pull a weight upwards along the front of your body.

name: Dumbbell Fly
description: A chest exercise where you lower and lift dumbbells out to the sides while lying on a bench.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
description: A chest exercise similar to the incline bench press but using dumbbells.

name: Machine Shoulder Press
description: A shoulder exercise performed on a machine that mimics the overhead press.

name: Reverse Pec Deck Fly
description: A machine exercise that targets the rear delts by mimicking the motion of a reverse fly.

name: Cable Crossover
description: A chest exercise that targets the inner chest by pulling cables across the body.

name: Seated Calf Raise
description: A calf exercise performed while seated, targeting the soleus muscle.

name: Standing Calf Raise
description: A calf exercise performed while standing, targeting the gastrocnemius muscle.

name: Romanian Deadlift
description: A deadlift variation that targets the hamstrings and glutes.

name: Glute Bridge
description: A lower body exercise that targets the glutes by lifting the hips off the ground while lying on your back.

name: Hip Thrust
description: A lower body exercise that targets the glutes by lifting the hips off the ground with the shoulders supported on a bench.

name: Cable Bicep Curl
description: An arm exercise that targets the biceps by curling a cable attachment.

name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
description: A shoulder exercise where you press dumbbells overhead.

name: Smith Machine Bench Press
description: A bench press variation performed on a Smith machine for added stability.

name: Hack Squat
description: A squat variation performed on a hack squat machine to target the quadriceps.

name: Reverse Lunge
description: A lower body exercise where you step backward into a lunge.

name: Step-Up
description: A lower body exercise where you step onto a raised platform.

name: Kettlebell Swing
description: A full-body exercise that involves swinging a kettlebell between the legs and up to shoulder height.

name: Goblet Squat
description: A squat variation performed while holding a weight in front of the chest.

name: Sumo Deadlift
description: A deadlift variation with a wide stance that targets the inner thighs and glutes.

name: Hip Abduction Machine
description: A machine exercise that targets the outer thighs by spreading the legs apart.

name: Hip Adduction Machine
description: A machine exercise that targets the inner thighs by bringing the legs together.

name: Cable Face Pull
description: A shoulder exercise that targets the rear delts by pulling a cable attachment towards the face.

name: Incline Dumbbell Fly
description: A chest exercise performed on an incline bench that targets the upper chest.

name: Dips
description: A chest and triceps exercise where you lower and lift your body using parallel bars.

name: Push-Up
description: A chest, shoulders, and triceps exercise where you push your body up from the ground.

name: Plank
description: A core exercise where you hold a push-up position for a set amount of time.

name: Russian Twist
description: An oblique exercise where you twist your torso side to side while holding a weight.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
description: An abdominal exercise where you raise your legs while hanging from a bar.

name: Mountain Climbers
description: A full-body exercise where you perform a running motion while in a plank position.

name: Burpees
description: A full-body exercise that involves a squat, jump, and push-up.

name: Box Jump
description: A lower body plyometric exercise where you jump onto a raised platform.

name: Turkish Get-Up
description: A full-body exercise that involves transitioning from lying down to standing up while holding a weight overhead.

name: Farmer's Walk
description: An exercise where you walk while holding heavy weights in each hand.

name: Snatch
description: An Olympic lift where you lift a barbell from the ground to overhead in one motion.

name: Clean and Jerk
description: An Olympic lift where you lift a barbell from the ground to the shoulders and then overhead.

name: Battle Ropes
description: An exercise where you create waves with heavy ropes to build strength and endurance.

name: Crunch Machine
description: A machine exercise that targets the abdominal muscles by mimicking the motion of a crunch.

name: Chest Supported Row Machine
description: A back exercise performed on a machine where you row with your chest supported on a pad, targeting the upper and middle back muscles.

name: Barbell Row
description: A back exercise where you pull a barbell towards your torso while bent over.

name: Skull Crusher
description: A tricep exercise where you lower a barbell towards your forehead and extend back up.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
description: A lower body exercise where you perform a split squat with your rear foot elevated on a bench.

name: Pallof Press
description: A core exercise that involves pressing a cable or resistance band away from the body to resist rotation.

name: Hanging Knee Raise
description: An abdominal exercise where you raise your knees towards your chest while hanging from a bar.

name: Landmine Press
description: A shoulder exercise where you press a barbell anchored at one end in a landmine attachment.

name: Landmine Row
description: A back exercise where you pull a barbell anchored at one end in a landmine attachment towards your torso.

name: Donkey Calf Raise
description: A calf exercise where you raise your heels while bent over with weight on your lower back.

name: Jump Rope
description: A cardiovascular exercise that involves jumping over a rope as it passes under your feet and over your head.

name: Running
description: A cardiovascular exercise that involves jogging or sprinting over a distance.

name: Cycling
description: A cardiovascular exercise that involves riding a bicycle, either stationary or moving.

name: Rowing Machine
description: A cardiovascular exercise that mimics the action of rowing a boat, using a machine.

name: Elliptical Trainer
description: A cardiovascular exercise performed on a machine that mimics walking or running without causing excessive pressure on the joints.

name: High-Intensity Interval Training (HIIT)
description: A form of cardiovascular exercise that alternates short periods of intense anaerobic exercise with less intense recovery periods.

name: Stair Climber
description: A cardiovascular exercise performed on a machine that mimics the motion of climbing stairs.

name: Aerobics
description: A form of cardiovascular exercise that includes rhythmic activities, often performed to music.

name: Dance Cardio
description: A cardiovascular exercise that involves various dance movements and routines to elevate heart rate.

name: Shadow Boxing
description: A cardiovascular exercise that involves throwing punches in the air to increase heart rate and improve cardiovascular fitness.

name: Narrow Grip Lat Pulldown
description: A lat pulldown variation where you use a narrow grip to target the inner back muscles.

name: Supinated Lat Pulldown
description: A lat pulldown variation where you use a supinated grip to target the biceps and upper back.

name: Cable Pullover
description: A back exercise where you pull a cable bar from above your head down towards your hips, focusing on the lats.

name: Dumbbell Pullover
description: A versatile exercise that targets the chest and lats by lowering and raising a dumbbell over your head while lying on a bench.

name: Reverse Grip Bench Press
description: A bench press variation where you use a reverse grip to emphasize the upper chest and triceps.

name: Cable Chest Press
description: A chest exercise where you press a cable attachment forward, similar to a bench press, but with constant tension.

name: Cable Front Raise
description: A shoulder exercise where you lift a cable attachment to the front, targeting the anterior deltoids.

name: Cable Lateral Raise
description: A shoulder exercise where you lift a cable attachment to the side, targeting the lateral deltoids.

name: Single-Arm Dumbbell Row
description: A back exercise where you row a dumbbell towards your torso while bent over, focusing on each side individually.

name: Dumbbell Shrug
description: A shoulder exercise that targets the trapezius by shrugging the shoulders while holding dumbbells.

name: Lying Leg Curl
description: A machine exercise that targets the hamstrings by curling the legs towards the buttocks while lying face down.

name: Good Morning
description: A lower body exercise where you hinge at the hips to lower your torso, targeting the hamstrings and glutes.

name: Zercher Squat
description: A squat variation where you hold the barbell in the crook of your elbows, emphasizing the quads and core.

name: Sissy Squat
description: A quad-focused squat variation performed with a sissy squat bench or by leaning back on the balls of your feet.

name: Jefferson Deadlift
description: A deadlift variation where you straddle the barbell, focusing on the quads, glutes, and core.

name: Cossack Squat
description: A lower body exercise where you perform a deep side lunge, targeting the inner thighs and glutes.

name: Dragon Flag
description: An advanced core exercise where you lower and raise your body in a straight line while lying on a bench.

name: Hollow Body Hold
description: A core exercise where you hold a hollow position, with your lower back pressed to the floor and your arms and legs extended.

name: Reverse Crunch
description: An abdominal exercise where you curl your hips towards your chest, focusing on the lower abs.

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
description: A core exercise that involves rolling an ab wheel away from your body while maintaining a stable core.

name: Pike Push-Up
description: A shoulder exercise where you perform a push-up in a pike position, emphasizing the shoulders.

name: Cable Crunch
description: An abdominal exercise where you perform a crunch motion with a cable attachment for added resistance.

name: Dumbbell Triceps Kickback
description: An isolation triceps exercise where you hinge forward, keep the upper arm fixed, and extend the elbow to move the dumbbell back.

name: Two-Arm Dumbbell Triceps Kickback
description: A triceps kickback variation using a dumbbell in each arm with the same bent-over elbow-extension pattern.

name: Seated Bent-Over Dumbbell Triceps Kickback
description: A triceps kickback performed seated while leaning forward to support the torso and isolate elbow extension.

name: Incline Bench Dumbbell Triceps Kickback
description: A triceps kickback performed face-down on an incline bench to brace the chest and reduce momentum.

name: Cable Triceps Kickback
description: A triceps kickback using a low cable, keeping the upper arm parallel to the floor while extending against the line of pull.

name: Cable Triceps Kickback from High Pulley
description: A triceps kickback pattern with the cable set higher so the pull angle emphasizes the long head differently.

name: Cable Glute Kickback
description: A hip-extension exercise where you sweep the working leg back against a low cable attached at the ankle or foot strap.

name: Glute Kickback Machine
description: A machine-guided hip kickback that loads glute extension through a padded lever or platform.

name: Banded Glute Kickback
description: A glute kickback performed with a resistance band anchored low or looped around the feet for hip extension.

name: Bodyweight Quadruped Glute Kickback
description: A bodyweight kickback from hands and knees, extending one hip straight back with a controlled squeeze at the top.

name: Standing Bodyweight Glute Kickback
description: A standing hip kickback extending the leg behind the body without equipment, often with a slight forward lean for balance.

name: Concentration Biceps
description: A biceps curl performed seated with the elbow braced against the inner thigh, curling a dumbbell toward the shoulder in a strict arc.

name: Dumbbell Bench Press
description: A horizontal press lying on a bench with dumbbells, allowing independent arm paths and a deep stretch at the bottom.

name: Decline Dumbbell Bench Press
description: A dumbbell chest press performed on a decline bench to emphasize the lower chest while pressing with a neutral-to-angled arm path.

name: Close-Grip Bench Press
description: A bench press with a narrower grip to shift more load onto the triceps while still training the chest and anterior shoulders.

name: Arnold Press
description: A seated or standing dumbbell press that rotates from palms-in at the bottom to palms-forward overhead, hitting all delt heads.

name: Push Press
description: An overhead press that uses a shallow dip and leg drive to accelerate the bar, allowing heavier loads than a strict press.

name: Chin-Up
description: A pull-up with an underhand grip that increases biceps and brachialis involvement while training the lats and upper back.

name: Straight-Arm Pulldown
description: A cable movement with elbows nearly locked, pulling the bar down toward the thighs to isolate lat engagement and shoulder extension.

name: Dumbbell Romanian Deadlift
description: A hip-hinge deadlift pattern holding dumbbells, emphasizing hamstrings and glutes with less low-back load than a barbell version.

name: Trap Bar Deadlift
description: A deadlift using a trap (hex) bar with a neutral grip and higher handles, often allowing a more upright torso and quad contribution.

name: Rack Pull
description: A partial deadlift from pins or blocks below the knee, overloading the upper back, traps, and grip with reduced leg range.

name: Front Squat
description: A squat with the barbell racked across the front delts, demanding an upright torso and strong core and quad emphasis.

name: Walking Lunge
description: A dynamic lunge pattern stepping forward alternately, training single-leg strength, balance, and hip/knee stability under load.

name: Forward Lunge
description: A split squat variation stepping forward into a deep lunge and returning, loading the front leg heavily through knee and hip extension.

name: Wall Sit
description: An isometric hold with back against a wall and thighs parallel to the floor, building quad endurance and mental toughness.

name: Pistol Squat
description: A single-leg squat to full depth with the non-working leg extended, demanding mobility, balance, and unilateral leg strength.

name: Nordic Hamstring Curl
description: A partner- or anchor-assisted hamstring exercise lowering the body from kneeling with hips extended, emphasizing eccentric strength.

name: Glute-Ham Raise
description: A glute-ham developer movement combining hip extension and knee flexion to heavily load hamstrings, glutes, and lower back.

name: Pendlay Row
description: A bent-over barbell row where each rep starts from a dead stop on the floor, prioritizing explosive upper-back pulling strength.

name: Inverted Row
description: A horizontal pull under a fixed bar or rings with the body straight, scaling difficulty by foot position and height.

name: Barbell Curl
description: A standing curl with a shoulder-width underhand grip on a barbell, allowing heavier loads than most dumbbell curl variations.

name: EZ Bar Curl
description: A barbell curl using an EZ-cam bar to reduce wrist strain while targeting the biceps and brachialis.

name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
description: A curl performed on an incline bench with arms hanging back, stretching the long head of the biceps through a long range of motion.

name: Zottman Curl
description: A dumbbell curl supinating on the way up and rotating to overhand for a slow lowering phase to hit brachioradialis and extensors.

name: Cable Overhead Tricep Extension
description: A triceps extension with the cable routed overhead, elbows fixed, extending the forearms to align with the high line of pull.

name: Diamond Push-Up
description: A push-up with hands close forming a diamond shape, increasing triceps demand while still training the chest and shoulders.

name: Bench Dip
description: A triceps dip performed with hands on a bench behind you and feet on the floor or elevated, lowering the hips by bending the elbows.

name: Lying Leg Raise
description: An abdominal exercise lying supine or on a bench, raising extended or bent legs toward the ceiling with controlled hip flexion.

name: Dead Bug
description: A supine core drill alternating opposite arm and leg extensions while keeping the low back pressed to the floor for anti-extension control.

name: Side Plank
description: A lateral isometric hold supported on one forearm and the side of the foot, resisting lateral flexion and building oblique endurance.

name: Cable Woodchopper
description: A diagonal cable chop from high to low or low to high across the body, training rotational power and oblique strength.

name: Bent-Over Dumbbell Rear Delt Fly
description: A hinge position fly with dumbbells, lifting the arms out to the sides with slight elbow bend to target the rear delts and rhomboids.

name: Barbell Shrug
description: A heavy upper trap exercise elevating the shoulders straight up against a barbell held in front or behind the body.

name: Power Clean
description: An explosive Olympic lift pulling the bar from the floor to the shoulders in one motion, training hips, back, and catch strength.

name: Clean and Press
description: A compound lift combining a power clean to the shoulders followed by an overhead press, targeting the entire body.

name: Hang Clean
description: An Olympic lift starting with the bar at hip height, explosively pulling it to the shoulders in a front rack position.

name: Power Snatch
description: An explosive Olympic lift pulling the bar from the floor to overhead in one motion, catching in a partial squat.

name: Hang Snatch
description: An Olympic lift starting with the bar at hip height, explosively pulling it overhead in one motion.

name: Squat Clean
description: A full Olympic clean where the lifter drops into a deep squat to catch the bar at the shoulders.

name: Squat Snatch
description: A full snatch where the lifter drops into a deep squat to catch the bar overhead.

name: Push Jerk
description: An explosive overhead lift starting from the shoulders, using a dip and drive with a quick drop under the bar.

name: Split Jerk
description: The competitive Olympic lift jerk where the lifter drops into a split stance to catch the bar overhead.

name: Thruster
description: A compound movement combining a front squat with an overhead press in one continuous motion.

name: Overhead Squat
description: A squat performed with the bar held overhead, demanding exceptional shoulder mobility, stability, and core strength.

name: Snatch Balance
description: An Olympic lift starting with the bar behind the neck, dropping into a squat while pressing the bar overhead.

name: Muscle Snatch
description: A snatch variation where the bar is pulled overhead without dropping under into a squat position.

name: Clean Pull
description: The first and second pull of the clean taken to full extension without catching the bar, focusing on explosive power.

name: Snatch Pull
description: The first and second pull of the snatch taken to full extension without catching the bar, focusing on explosive triple extension.

name: High Pull
description: An explosive pull from the floor or hang position, bringing the bar to chest height with elbows high.

name: Pause Squat
description: A back squat with a deliberate pause at the bottom to eliminate stretch reflex and build strength from the hole.

name: Pin Squat
description: A squat starting from pins at various heights, eliminating the eccentric phase to build concentric strength.

name: Box Squat
description: A squat performed to a box or bench, allowing the lifter to sit back and develop posterior chain engagement.

name: Safety Bar Squat
description: A squat performed with a safety squat bar to reduce shoulder stress and emphasize upper back and quad strength.

name: Pause Bench Press
description: A bench press with a pause on the chest to eliminate momentum and build explosive pressing power from a dead stop.

name: Floor Press
description: A bench press performed lying on the floor with legs extended, limiting range of motion and emphasizing lockout strength.

name: Deficit Deadlift
description: A deadlift performed while standing on a raised platform to increase range of motion and leg drive off the floor.

name: Block Pull
description: A deadlift from elevated blocks or pins, reducing range of motion to overload the lockout phase.

name: One Arm Kettlebell Snatch
description: An explosive single-arm lift swinging a kettlebell from between the legs to overhead in one fluid motion.

name: Kettlebell Clean and Press
description: A compound movement swinging a kettlebell to the shoulder in a rack position, then pressing it overhead.

name: Dumbbell Snatch
description: An explosive single-arm lift pulling a dumbbell from the floor to overhead in one motion.

name: Single Arm Dumbbell Press
description: An overhead press performed with one dumbbell, engaging the core for stability and anti-rotation.

name: Dumbbell Step-Up
description: A lower body exercise stepping onto a raised platform while holding dumbbells at the sides.

name: Single Leg Romanian Deadlift
description: A unilateral hinge exercise balancing on one leg while lowering dumbbells toward the floor.

name: Renegade Row
description: A plank position row with dumbbells, alternating arms while maintaining core stability.

name: Dumbbell Thruster
description: A combination of a dumbbell front squat with an overhead press in one continuous movement.

name: Waiter's Carry
description: A core stability exercise holding one dumbbell or kettlebell overhead while walking.

name: Suitcase Carry
description: A core exercise holding a dumbbell or kettlebell at one side while walking, resisting lateral flexion.
